content.cn_text: 夏洛特:打扰一下，吐温博士。我可以和你谈谈吗?
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: Excuse me, Dr Twain. May I speak with you for a minute?

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:当然可以，请进。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: Of course, please come in.

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:我是夏洛特·约克。我在考虑选您的旅游课程。
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: I'm Charlotte York. I'm considering taking your course in Tourism.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:对。夏洛特，我能帮你什么忙吗?
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: Right. Well, Charlotte, how can I help you?

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:我一直在考虑学习旅游，然而，这是一个如此重要的决定，我想先寻求一些建议。你介意回答我几个问题吗?
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: I have been considering studying Tourism, however, it is such an important decision that I would like to seek some advice about it first. Would you mind answering some of my questions?

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:当然，说吧!
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: Absolutely, fire away!

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:我一直在和我父母讨论课程，他们担心我拿了旅游专业的学位后找不到一份高薪的工作。我想学习这门课的原因是我对这门课很感兴趣，我想我会很喜欢的。我相信我享受生活的唯一方式就是享受我的事业。幸福远比金钱重要，你不觉得吗?
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: Well I have been discussing courses with my parents and they are concerned that I will not be able to get a well-paid job with a degree in Tourism. The reason that I want to study the course is that I have a great interest in the subject and I think I would really enjoy it. I believe the only way that I will enjoy my life is if I enjoy my career. Happiness is far more important than money, don't you think?

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:当然。我宁愿幸福而贫穷，也不愿富裕而痛苦。金钱买不到幸福。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: Absolutely. I would much rather be happy and poor rather than rich and miserable. Money cannot buy you happiness.

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:我很高兴你同意。
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: I'm glad you agree.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:你不必担心钱的问题，夏洛特。旅游课程的很大一部分是专门教学生如何管理财务，一项技能，你
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: You needn't worry about money, Charlotte. A large part of the Tourism course is dedicated to teaching students how to manage finances, a skill that you

content.cn_text: 也可以应用到你的日常生活中。我还建议你选修一门时间管理的副业课程，因为这对有效规划你的工作量非常有用。效率是成功的关键!
content.en_text: can apply to your everyday life as well. I would also recommend that you take a sideline course in time management, as this can be incredibly useful in efficiently planning your workload. Efficiency is the key to success!

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:我会记住的。
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: I'll remember that.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:现在我发现有些学生有天赋，这确实有助于他们在课程中取得成功。例如，沟通技巧是非常有益的。你有什么优点吗?
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: Now I have found that some students have natural talents that really help them to succeed in the course. Communication skills, for example, can be very beneficial.Do you have any strengths?

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:数学一直是我在学校最喜欢的科目，所以我真的很喜欢解决数学问题，但是我发现统计很难。我一直都很能干，自给自足。我对自己的能力很有信心，在不需要别人帮助的情况下会主动采取行动。
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: Maths was always my favourite subject at school so I really enjoy solving mathematical problems, however I find statistics quite difficult. I have always been very capable and selfsufficient. I have a lot of confidence in my abilities and will take the initiative in situations without needing to depend on anyone else for their help.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:这确实是一种很好的品质，如果你选择学习旅游业，这将特别有用。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: That's a really great quality to have and will be particularly useful if you choose to study Tourism.

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:太好了。
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: That's great.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:我建议你花点时间研究一下这门课程。许多对这一主题没有受过教育的人声称旅游业是一个正在萎缩的行业，未来它将变得无关紧要。然而，如果你研究已发表的研究，你会发现事实恰恰相反。 .事实上，随着人们对文化和旅游的兴趣日益浓厚，旅游行业也有了显著增长。你把大学课程和理工学院的课程比较过吗?
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: I would recommend that you spend some of your time researching the course. A lot of people who are uneducated on the subject claim that Tourism is a shrinking industry and that it will become irrelevant in the future. If you study the published research however, you will see that the truth is quite the opposite. The industry has, in fact, grown significantly as people have developed an ever-increasing interest in culture and travel. Have you compared the university course with a polytechnic?

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:是的，我有。我对学习模块课程很感兴趣。然而，这所大学不提供这种选择。我没有足够的资金去上一所昂贵的大学，所以当我看到这门课程相当实惠时，我松了一口气。我也考虑过去上暑期学校而不是上大学，这样可以省钱，也可以在一年剩下的时间里工作，但我真正想要的是大学经历。
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: Yes, I have. I was interested in studying the course in modules. However,the university doesn't offer that option. I don't have enough funds to be able to attend an expensive university, so I was relieved to see that the course is quite affordable.I also considered attending a summer school instead of university to save money and so that I could work during the rest of the year, but I really wanted the university experience.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:我认为那所大学很适合你。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: I think that university would suit you well.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:现在，课程怎么样?你对这些有兴趣吗
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: Now, what about the courses? Are you interested in any of the

content.cn_text: 还有其他课程吗?
content.en_text: other subjects on offer?

content.cn_text: 梅拉尼·E:我看过一些。我对旅游和商业很感兴趣，因为它听起来和旅游业很像。
content.en_text: MELANI E: I have looked at a few. I was interested in Travel and Business as it sounds similar to Tourism.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:这确实值得学习，然而，要意识到这很难，而且会花费你很多时间。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: That is really worth learning, however, be aware that it is difficult and will demand a lot of your time.

content.cn_text: 媚兰:好的，知道这个很好。
content.en_text: MELANIE: OK, that's good to know.

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:你可能会发现日语是一门有趣的课程，它会教你说这门语言的宝贵技能。就我个人而言，这并不坏，可能会有所帮助，但不是那么多。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: You might find that Japanese is an interesting course and it will teach you valuable skills in speaking the language. Personally, it's not bad and could be of some help, but not that much.

content.cn_text: 梅勒妮:好的，日语，知道了……那医疗保健呢?
content.en_text: MELANIE: OK, Japanese, got that.. .What about Medical Care?

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:嗯，如果你有时间，这个课程会教你很多关于治疗疾病和疾病，或者在外面处理伤害的知识，尽管这不是必需的。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: Well, if you have time, the course will teach you a lot about curing diseases and illnesses, or dealing with injuries outside, although it's not essential.

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:好吧，如果有用的话，我就买了。
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: So, OK, if it's useful, I'll take it.

content.cn_text: 马克·吐温博士:如果你喜欢使用技术，又担心无法达到入学要求，计算机对申请人必须具备的技能要求非常宽松。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: If you enjoy using technology and are worried about fulfilling the entry requirements, computing is very relaxed about the skills that applicants must possess.

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:我的电脑很差，所以我不确定我是否会喜欢这门课。公共关系怎么样?
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: I'm terrible with computers so I'm not sure that I would enjoy that course.How about Public Relations?

content.cn_text: 吐温博士:是的，我推荐那门课。这将与进入旅游业有关，因为它将教会你如何接近客户并与他们建立联系。
content.en_text: DR TWAIN: Yes, I would recommend that course. It would be related to entering the Tourism industry as it will educate you on how to approach clients and develop associations with them.

content.cn_text: 夏洛特:太好了!非常感谢你的帮助!
content.en_text: CHARLOTTE: That's great! Thank you so much for your help!

groups.desc:
Questions 21-25
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: Why does the student want to study Tourism?
items.analysis: Charlotte选择学习旅游专业是因为她对这个学科有浓厚的兴趣，并且相信从事自己喜欢的职业会带来更好的人生。她强调幸福比金钱更重要，这表明她的选择是基于长期的职业满足感和生活质量，而不是短期的经济回报。这种态度暗示了她认为选择一个能让自己快乐的职业会带来更好的未来，因此A选项（good future）最符合她的选择动机。

items.title: What kind of skill will the student gain in the course?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出旅游课程的很大一部分致力于教授学生如何管理财务，这直接对应了选项B中的"financial planning"（财务规划）。题目询问学生在课程中会获得什么技能，而管理财务正是一项重要的财务规划技能。因此，B选项是最符合原文内容的答案。

items.title: The student has the ability of
items.analysis: 文中Charlotte描述自己"self-sufficient"（自给自足）和"take the initiative...without needing to depend on anyone else"（主动采取行动，不依赖他人），这些描述都明确表明了她具有独立性。因此，选项A（independence）最准确地反映了Charlotte所描述的能力。

items.title: The teacher believes that the industry of tourism is
items.analysis: 文中明确指出旅游业"grown significantly"（显著增长），并解释了原因是人们对文化和旅行的兴趣不断增加。这直接对应了选项C "growing popular"（日益流行）。此外，文中使用"in fact"（事实上）来强调这一观点，表明这是对旅游业现状的准确描述，而不是猜测或预测。

items.title: How does the student compare the university course with polytechnics?

options.title: B
options.content: The course is structured in modules.

items.analysis: 文中Charlotte提到她没有足够的资金去上昂贵的大学，但她对这个课程的价格感到欣慰，说明这个课程是负担得起的。这直接对应了选项C "The price is reasonable"（价格合理）。这表明在比较大学课程和理工学院课程时，价格的合理性是一个关键因素。

groups.desc:
Questions 26-30
What feature do the speakers identify for each of the following courses?
Choose FIVE answers from the box and write the correct letters, A-G, next to
questions 26-30.
Features

items.title: Travel and Business
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是E (intensive)，因为原文中Dr Twain描述Travel and Business课程"difficult and will demand a lot of your time"（困难且会占用大量时间）。这种描述完全符合"intensive"（密集的，强化的）的定义。"Intensive"通常用来描述需要大量时间和精力投入的课程或活动，而原文中提到的难度和时间要求正是intensive课程的典型特征。

items.title: Japanese
items.analysis: 文中Dr Twain对日语课程的评价是"not bad and could be of some help, but not that much"，这表明日语课程可能有一些价值，但并不太大。这与选项A "limited value"（有限的价值）最为吻合。Dr Twain的评价显示了对日语课程价值的保留态度，强调了它的帮助是有限的，这正是"limited value"的核心含义。

items.title: Medical Care
items.analysis: Medical Care课程被描述为能教授学生很多关于治疗疾病和处理伤害的知识，这明显表明了课程的实用性。虽然Dr Twain提到"it's not essential"（它不是必需的），但这并不否定课程的有用性，只是表明它不是必修课。因此，"useful"（有用的）最准确地描述了Medical Care课程的特点。

items.title: Computer
items.analysis: 文中提到计算机课程对申请者的技能要求非常宽松（"very relaxed about the skills that applicants must possess"），这直接对应了选项D中的"flexible admission"（灵活的入学要求）。虽然原文没有直接使用"flexible admission"这个词组，但"relaxed about the skills"实际上传达了同样的意思，即入学要求是灵活的，不严格的。这要求学生能够理解同义表达，并将听到的信息与给出的选项进行匹配。

items.title: Public Relations
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C（relevant to career），因为Dr Twain明确指出Public Relations课程与进入旅游业相关。他解释说这门课程会教授学生如何接近客户并发展与客户的关系，这些技能显然与旅游业的职业发展直接相关。因此，Public Relations课程被描述为与未来职业相关，而不仅仅是有用或有限价值。
